name: PolicyCheck
description: Pre-purchase seller policy verification for AI agents. Analyzes e-commerce seller return policies, shipping terms, warranty conditions, and legal clauses. Returns structured JSON with a risk score (0-10), letter grade (A-F), categorized policy flags with severity levels (low/medium/high), identified policy strengths, and source-aware analysis distinguishing consumer-facing terms from legal boilerplate. All assessments are cryptographically signed with Ed25519 for tamper-proof verification. Supports x402 micropayments, REST API, MCP, and A2A protocols.
